nasb.text: O sing to the Lord a new song, For He has done wonderful things, His right hand and His holy arm have gained the victory for Him.

esv.text: Oh sing to the Lord  a new song, for he has done marvelous things! His right hand and his holy arm have worked salvation for him.

cnv.text: 你們要向耶和華唱新歌， 因為他行了奇妙的事； 他的右手和他的聖臂，為他施行拯救。

ccb.text: 你们要向耶和华唱新歌， 因为祂的作为奇妙， 祂以右手和圣洁的臂膀施行拯救。

csbs.text: 你们当向耶和华唱新歌， 因为他行了奇妙的事， 他的右手和圣洁的膀臂带来了拯救。
